code: import i18n from'i18next';import{initReactI18next}from'react-i18next';import zhTranslation from'./locales/zh/translation.json';import enTranslation from'./locales/en/translation.json';const savedLanguage=localStorage.getItem('piggy-language')||'zh';i18n.use(initReactI18next).init({resources:{zh:{translation:zhTranslation},en:{translation:enTranslation}},lng:savedLanguage,fallbackLng:'zh',interpolation:{escapeValue:false}});export default i18n;
